case_title: CCSF-TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. AMANDO L CUMAGUN

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF-TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT CUMAGUN, AMANDO L

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF-TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CUMAGUN, AMANDO L $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.97 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,095.97 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-29-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-30-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF CCSF-TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY ROSEBEL SINGH. DEFENDANT AMANDO L. CUMAGUN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-29-2017 - JUDGMENT.
